questions.statement:
<p>Choose the correct antonym of the given word from the options given below.</p>

<p>COMMEND</p>

<p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);   font-weight: 700; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Directions: Item in this section consists of a sentence with an underlined word followed by four words. Select the option that is nearest in meaning to the underlined word and mark your response in your Answer Sheet accordingly.</span></p>

<p>Good marriages are presented as just as much of an <u>aberration</u> in that they are portrayed as curiosities, as objects on display.</p>

<p><strong>Choose the alternative that best expresses the meaning of the idiom in italics:</strong></p>

<p>There was opposition to the new policy by the <em><u><strong>rank and file</strong></u></em> of&nbsp;the Government.</p>

<p>Choose the alternative which best expresses the underlined phrase:</p>

<p>He is <u>out and out</u> a reactionary.</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate antonym of the given word.</p>

<p>ACQUISITION</p>
